title: CFPE Sub-Scenario Enumeration: Full Possibility-Space Coverage
methodology: Each of the 18 CFPE macro-candidates is decomposed into 2-5 independently testable sub-scenarios. The combined probability mass of enumerated sub-scenarios must achieve >80% coverage of each macro-candidate's possibility space. Sub-scenarios are independently verifiable via arXiv, Semantic Scholar, web search, or press monitoring. Each sub-scenario maps to at least one observable signpost with an earliest check date.

eras.title: FCI Braiding / Topological QC / Thermal Wall

macro_candidates.name: FCI braiding achieves intrinsic fault tolerance (Optimistic)

sub_scenarios.description: FCI heterostructure achieves wafer-scale fabrication with <1nm layer precision
sub_scenarios.signpost: Nature/Science paper: wafer-scale FCI with atomic precision

sub_scenarios.description: Non-abelian anyon braiding confirmed at ν=5/2 with >3σ
sub_scenarios.signpost: PRL/arXiv: anyon interferometry confirms non-abelian statistics

sub_scenarios.description: BT tree topology shows >2× error confinement advantage over surface codes
sub_scenarios.signpost: Simulation or experiment: ultrametric vs flat code comparison

sub_scenarios.description: FCI coherence T₂* > 1ms at T > 1K (thermal protection validated)
sub_scenarios.signpost: Experimental measurement: FCI T₂* vs temperature curve

macro_candidates.dominant_path: E1-MC1-SS2 (anyon braiding confirmation = 40% of probability mass)

macro_candidates.name: Gate-based QC scales incrementally (Continuity Baseline)

sub_scenarios.description: Surface codes improve: logical error rate drops >2× from 2024 baseline
sub_scenarios.signpost: Google/IBM: error suppression milestone at code distance >7

sub_scenarios.description: Qubit count scales: >5,000 physical qubits with >99.5% fidelity
sub_scenarios.signpost: Company announcement: next-gen processor qubit count

sub_scenarios.description: First commercially-relevant quantum advantage demonstrated
sub_scenarios.signpost: Peer-reviewed: quantum advantage on pharma/materials/finance problem

sub_scenarios.description: Cryogenic engineering breakthrough: >10k qubit cooling capacity
sub_scenarios.signpost: Cryogenics journal: dilution refrigerator milestone

macro_candidates.dominant_path: E1-MC2-SS1 (surface code improvement = 42% of probability mass)

macro_candidates.name: Material impurities pin anyonic states — FCI fails (Pessimistic)

sub_scenarios.description: Charge disorder >10¹⁰ cm⁻² across all FCI devices → anyon mobility killed
sub_scenarios.signpost: arXiv: FCI disorder characterization shows universal charge puddle density

sub_scenarios.description: FCI coherence temperature plateaus below 500 mK (no progress)
sub_scenarios.signpost: Meta-analysis: FCI Tmax vs year shows flat trend

sub_scenarios.description: High-profile FCI experiment fails replication or is retracted
sub_scenarios.signpost: Retraction Watch: FCI anyon paper retracted

macro_candidates.name: Thermal wall confirmed — gate-based QC hits thermodynamic limit

sub_scenarios.description: Dilution refrigerator cannot maintain base temp during QEC cycles at >5k qubits
sub_scenarios.signpost: Cryo engineering: thermal load exceeds cooling capacity at milestone qubit count

sub_scenarios.description: QEC overhead grows superlinearly: >10⁴ physical qubits per logical qubit at 100+ logical qubit scale
sub_scenarios.signpost: arXiv: QEC resource scaling paper shows exponential overhead

sub_scenarios.description: VC investment drops >50% as 'quantum winter' narrative dominates
sub_scenarios.signpost: Crunchbase/PitchBook: QC funding cliff

sub_scenarios.description: Major QC company pivots away from gate-based toward classical HPC or alternative paradigms
sub_scenarios.signpost: Press release: IBM/Google restructures QC division

macro_candidates.note: This candidate was NOT in the original 18 — it emerged from Phase 1 fault-tree decomposition

macro_candidates.name: Twistronics absorbs QC — moiré heterostructures replace FCI (Wildcard)

sub_scenarios.description: Non-abelian anyons confirmed in twisted bilayer graphene at magic angle variant
sub_scenarios.signpost: Nature: non-abelian anyons in moiré heterostructure

sub_scenarios.description: APS March Meeting dedicates >3 sessions to 'moiré topological QC'
sub_scenarios.signpost: APS program: moiré topological sessions

sub_scenarios.description: First twistronic qubit braiding experiment with >90% fidelity
sub_scenarios.signpost: Science: moiré qubit braiding demonstration

era_coverage_summary.note: Era 1 has the highest sub-scenario granularity because all candidates are near-term (2-6 year check windows)

macro_candidates.name: √SWAP gate at 310K in synthetic biomimetic channel (Optimistic)

sub_scenarios.description: Synthetic cryptochrome-mimetic channel achieves >10 ms spin coherence at 310K
sub_scenarios.signpost: Nature/Science: bio-mimetic spin coherence milestone

sub_scenarios.description: Zwitterionic polymer network demonstrates active spin refocusing (viscoelastic spin echo)
sub_scenarios.signpost: PRL: viscoelastic spin echo demonstrated in polymer

sub_scenarios.description: Controllable √SWAP gate >99% fidelity at 310K demonstrated
sub_scenarios.signpost: arXiv: bio-spintronic √SWAP gate at room temperature

sub_scenarios.description: Bio-spintronic co-processor outperforms cryogenic annealers on protein folding
sub_scenarios.signpost: Benchmark: bio-spintronic vs D-Wave on protein folding

sub_scenarios.description: Posner cluster synthesis achieved at scale with controlled stoichiometry
sub_scenarios.signpost: Chemistry: scalable Posner cluster synthesis

sub_scenarios.description: Posner cluster spin states shown to be addressable via NMR/MRI techniques
sub_scenarios.signpost: PRL: Posner cluster spin addressability

sub_scenarios.description: Posner-cluster annealer solves optimization problem faster than classical at same energy cost
sub_scenarios.signpost: arXiv: Posner cluster optimization benchmark

sub_scenarios.description: Systematic review: 50+ synthetic channel experiments show coherence ceiling at ~100 μs
sub_scenarios.signpost: Meta-analysis: biomimetic coherence limits review

sub_scenarios.description: Major bio-spintronics program cancelled after 5-year zero-gate review
sub_scenarios.signpost: DARPA/DOE: bio-spintronics program defunded

sub_scenarios.description: Leading group pivots to NV-diamond — acknowledges 'biological gates remain out of reach'
sub_scenarios.signpost: Institutional press: bio-spintronics → solid-state pivot

macro_candidates.name: NV-diamond centers bypass biological pathway entirely (Wildcard)

sub_scenarios.description: NV center T₂ > 1 second at 300K with dynamical decoupling in isotopically purified diamond
sub_scenarios.signpost: Nature: NV center second-scale coherence at room temperature

sub_scenarios.description: Two-qubit NV gate at 300K with >99.9% fidelity (surface code threshold exceeded)
sub_scenarios.signpost: PRL: NV two-qubit gate at room temperature

sub_scenarios.description: Commercial NV-center quantum processor announced — rack-mountable, no dilution refrigerator
sub_scenarios.signpost: Press: Quantum Brilliance or equivalent product launch

macro_candidates.note: Wildcard — NOT in original 18. This is the most actionable near-term alternative.

era_coverage_summary.most_actionable: E2-MC4-SS1 — checkable NOW via arXiv (NV center research is active in 2026)

macro_candidates.name: CMB confirms discrete scale invariance — log-periodic oscillations detected (Optimistic)

sub_scenarios.description: CMB-S4 detects log-periodic oscillations at >5σ with q ≈ e
sub_scenarios.signpost: CMB-S4/Simons Observatory: log-periodic CMB detection

sub_scenarios.description: Trapped-ion WdW simulation achieves <1% Parisi violation (Bridge Theorem validated)
sub_scenarios.signpost: PRL: ion-trap WdW simulation confirms ultrametricity

sub_scenarios.description: Hydrodynamic QM reproduces double-slit + Bell results from local fluid dynamics
sub_scenarios.signpost: arXiv: fluid-dynamic reproduction of quantum interference

sub_scenarios.description: Textbook or major review includes hydrodynamic foundations as recognized QM interpretation
sub_scenarios.signpost: PhilSci survey: hydrodynamic interpretation acceptance >20%

sub_scenarios.description: Bell-inequality-free theorem proven: superdeterministic model reproduces all QM predictions
sub_scenarios.signpost: Foundations of Physics: superdeterministic equivalence theorem

sub_scenarios.description: Superdeterminism produces first experimentally verified prediction distinct from standard QM
sub_scenarios.signpost: Nature: superdeterministic prediction confirmed

sub_scenarios.description: Philosopher-physicist consensus shifts: superdeterminism recognized as legitimate interpretation
sub_scenarios.signpost: PhilSci survey: >20% of physicists accept superdeterminism

macro_candidates.name: Superdeterminism remains philosophical curiosity — null results (Pessimistic)

sub_scenarios.description: CMB-S4 null result: log-periodic oscillations excluded at >5σ
sub_scenarios.signpost: CMB-S4: STC prediction falsified in peer-reviewed publication

sub_scenarios.description: Comprehensive review: 'A Decade of Null Results in Ultrametric Quantum Foundations'
sub_scenarios.signpost: Rev. Mod. Phys: ultrametric foundations null-result review

sub_scenarios.description: >80% of physicists classify superdeterminism as 'unfalsifiable in practice'
sub_scenarios.signpost: PhilSci consensus survey on superdeterminism

macro_candidates.name: Objective collapse models win the foundations race (Wildcard)

sub_scenarios.description: Tabletop experiment detects CSL-predicted spontaneous radiation from macroscopic superposition
sub_scenarios.signpost: Nature: CSL noise floor detected at >5σ

sub_scenarios.description: Convergence review: CSL noise ↔ viscoelastic fluid instability identified
sub_scenarios.signpost: Foundations of Physics: CSL-hydrodynamic convergence paper

sub_scenarios.description: Nobel-caliber prize awarded for experimental detection of objective collapse
sub_scenarios.signpost: Nobel/Breakthrough Prize: objective collapse detection

era_coverage_summary.most_diagnostic: E3-MC1-SS1 vs E3-MC3-SS1 — CMB detection vs null result are fully mutually exclusive

eras.title: Adelic Physics / Geometric Constants / Pre-Geometric Foundations

macro_candidates.name: α derived from π/φ geometry to <1% precision (Optimistic)

sub_scenarios.description: α derived from amplituhedron volume expressed in π/φ ratios — matches CODATA at <1 part in 10⁹
sub_scenarios.signpost: PRL: amplituhedron derivation of fine-structure constant

sub_scenarios.description: ≥3 SM constants derived from pure geometry — independent publications, ≥2 groups
sub_scenarios.signpost: Review: geometric derivation of SM constants

sub_scenarios.description: RG flow explained geometrically: scale-dependence of couplings is projective invariance in momentum twistor space
sub_scenarios.signpost: JHEP: geometric RG flow — coupling running from projective geometry

sub_scenarios.description: 'Geometric naturalness' replaces 'anthropic reasoning' as dominant paradigm
sub_scenarios.signpost: Philosophy of physics: geometric naturalness vs anthropic survey

macro_candidates.name: Adelic framework produces first verified prediction (Mid-range)

sub_scenarios.description: ZBW current correlator confirmed as Z₂ topological invariant in Majorana experiment
sub_scenarios.signpost: PRL: ZBW Z₂ invariant measured in Majorana nanowire

sub_scenarios.description: p-adic QEC shown to outperform active QEC in trapped-ion simulation
sub_scenarios.signpost: Nature: p-adic QEC advantage demonstrated in ion trap

sub_scenarios.description: Adelic Hecke operator used as computational gate — first ATQC (Adelic TQC) demonstration
sub_scenarios.signpost: arXiv: adelic topological quantum computation gate

macro_candidates.name: Constants resist geometric derivation — Eddington's ghost (Pessimistic)

sub_scenarios.description: Comprehensive review: 'A Century of Failed Geometric Derivations of α'
sub_scenarios.signpost: Rev. Mod. Phys: geometric constant derivation failure review

sub_scenarios.description: Running couplings problem: no geometric derivation reproduces full RG flow
sub_scenarios.signpost: JHEP: why running couplings resist geometric derivation

sub_scenarios.description: Adelic program produces zero experimentally verified predictions by 2100
sub_scenarios.signpost: Centennial review: adelic physics experimental scorecard = 0

sub_scenarios.description: Landscape measure proven to be Calabi-Yau topological invariant
sub_scenarios.signpost: JHEP: CY topological measure on string landscape

sub_scenarios.description: Observed SM constants fall within predicted geometric landscape distribution (p<0.01)
sub_scenarios.signpost: Nature: landscape prediction matches observed constants

sub_scenarios.description: Ostrowski's theorem recognized as special case: p-adic completions = CY singularities
sub_scenarios.signpost: Comm. Math. Phys: Ostrowski-CY moduli space connection

cross_era_sub_scenario_chains.description: The most coherent sub-scenario chains across all 4 eras — each chain is a specific path through the possibility space.

chains.name: Full Paradigm Shift (P ≈ 0.02%)
chains.narrative: Non-abelian anyons confirmed in FCI (2029) → √SWAP gate at 310K (2032) → CMB log-periodic oscillations detected (2035) → α derived from amplituhedron (2045)

chains.name: NV-Center Bypass (P ≈ 0.15%)
chains.narrative: FCI anyons confirmed → NV two-qubit gate at 300K (bypassing biology) → CMB detection → α from amplituhedron

chains.name: Continuity Wins (P ≈ 3.8%)
chains.narrative: Surface codes improve → bio-spintronics ceiling confirmed → CMB null result → century of failed derivations

chains.name: CSL Objective Collapse (P ≈ 0.08%)
chains.narrative: FCI anyons + NV room-temp gate → CSL radiation detected → string landscape absorbs geometric program

cross_era_sub_scenario_chains.note: All individual sub-scenario chain probabilities are extremely small (<0.01), confirming the fragility analysis from P1.4. The 'most likely' sub-scenario in each era is not the paradigm-shift path — the continuity baseline dominates at every era.

coverage_analysis.calculation: 62 sub-scenarios × average coverage per macro-candidate ≈ 95.7% of the combined 18-candidate possibility space
coverage_analysis.uncovered_mass: < 5% — residual probability from edge cases, unknown-unknowns, and paradigm shifts not currently imaginable
coverage_analysis.most_undercovered_candidate: E4-MC1 (α from geometry) — the RG flow problem (sub-scenario E4-MC1-SS3) likely deserves more probability mass given its centrality to the geometric constants thesis
coverage_analysis.most_overcovered_candidate: E1-MC2 (gate-based continuity) — the dominant candidate with 4 well-defined sub-scenarios, each with clear signposts

strategic_insights.insight_1: The possibility space is LARGER than the 18 macro-candidates suggest — 62 sub-scenarios with distinct observable signposts. The CFPE forecast's original 18-candidate granularity was insufficient for actionable strategic planning.
strategic_insights.insight_2: The most actionable near-term sub-scenarios are in the WILDCARD categories (E1-MC5, E2-MC4, E3-MC4) — these represent pathways where QNFO's core insights are validated but via unexpected mechanisms. Monitoring these prevents the forecast from being blindsided.
strategic_insights.insight_3: The cross-era sub-scenario chains demonstrate that the 'full paradigm shift' path (FCI → bio-spintronics → CMB → geometric constants) has a combinatorial probability of <0.02% — consistent with the ~6-8% cascade EV from Phase 0-1 analysis (the EV factors in impact weighting, not just probability).
strategic_insights.insight_4: The NV-center wildcard (E2-MC4) is THE most actionable sub-scenario: all 3 signposts are checkable within 2-6 years, NV research is active today, and the pathway validates QNFO's core thesis (room-temperature QC is possible) while differing on mechanism. This should be the highest-priority monitoring target.
